title: Assistant Store Manager - Durian Furniture South Asia Partners - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Durian Furniture South Asia Partners - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Durian Furniture South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Durian Furniture South Asia Partners:
Durian Furniture South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture South Asia Partners!
